title: Build Manifest
description: Machine-generated artifact descriptor written by the build job and consumed by deploy jobs. Passed as a GitLab dotenv artifact.

vendor_version.description: Vendor version of the packaged software.

artifact_type.description: File type of the produced artifact.

artifact_path.description: Relative path to the produced artifact within the CI workspace.

artifact_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the artifact file.

framework.description: Framework repo name used to build this artifact.

built_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the build completed.

commit_tag.description: The vX.Y.Z tag that triggered this pipeline.
